## What This PR Changes

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## How To Test

List the verification steps someone should run to validate this PR.

## Checklist

- [ ] PHP syntax sweep passes
- [ ] PHP tests pass
- [ ] JS tests pass
- [ ] Docs updated if the change affects users or contributors
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` includes an `Unreleased` note when the change should be called out
